dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1140 EH: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 5408) to accelerate workplace time-to-contract under the National Labor Relations Act.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 5408) to accelerate workplace time-to-contract under the National Labor Relations Act.

section.text: That immediately upon adoption of this resolution, the House shall proceed to the consideration in the House of the bill (H.R. 5408) to accelerate workplace time-to-contract under the National Labor Relations Act. All points of order against consideration of the bill are waived. The bill shall be considered as read. All points of order against provisions in the bill are waived. The previous question shall be considered as ordered on the bill and on any amendment thereto to final passage without intervening motion except: (1) one hour of debate equally divided and controlled by the chair and ranking minority member of the Committee on Education and Workforce or their respective designees; and (2) one motion to recommit.
Clause 1(c) of rule XIX and clause 8 of rule XX shall not apply to the consideration of H.R. 5408.
The Clerk shall transmit to the Senate a message that the House has passed H.R. 5408 no later than three calendar days after passage.
